series_metadata.series_description: Records are maintained to provide state fiscal year analysis of projected agency expenditures with minority business vendors. Records may include: Projection Plan; Strategic Plan; Annual Minority Business Plan; Action Plan; Minority Business Enterprise Exemption Form. MBE Vendor Tracking Log and various other forms and supporting documents.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: three (3) state fiscal years from date of approval of strategic plan related state fiscal year. Review by State Archives. A Certification of Disposal is required when destroying these records. ; Electronic: three (3) state fiscal years from date of approval of strategic plan related state fiscal year. Review by State Archives. A Certification of Disposal is required when destroying these records
